problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to or, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
